How It Works

Liquidity That Lifts
Everyone Up

$POOL pairs with tokens launched on Printr, creating deep liquidity on Meteora that benefits every token in the ecosystem.

01

Token Gets Pooled

A new token launched on Printr pairs with $POOL on Meteora, creating a concentrated liquidity pool. This instantly gives the token a second trading pair and more visibility.

02

Arb Bots Trade

Price differences between the POOL pair and other pairs (like SOL) create arbitrage opportunities. Bots trade across these pairs, generating volume and fees for liquidity providers.

03

Everyone Benefits

The paired token gains visibility and additional liquidity depth. $POOL LPs earn trading fees. The whole ecosystem gets more trading activity and price discovery.
